transcript: Speaker A: खरं सांगू तुला, मला कॉल जॉईन करताना खूप ऑकवर्ड वाटत होतं. [To be honest, I felt very awkward joining the call.] Speaker B: सेम, मला वाटलं समोरचा जज करेल. [Same, I thought the other person would judge.] Speaker A: पण इथे सगळेच शिकायला आलेत ना? [But everyone is here to learn, right?] Speaker B: हो, म्हणून हळूहळू कॉन्फिडन्स येतोय. [Yes, that's why confidence is slowly coming.] Speaker A: नाईस, मग रोज प्रॅक्टिस करतोस? [Nice, so do you practice daily?] Speaker B: हो, आय प्रॅक्टिस डेली ॲटलीस्ट फॉर १५ टू २० मिनिट्स. [Yes, I practice daily at least for 15 to 20 minutes.] Speaker A: अरे वा! मस्त इंग्लिश बोलायला लागलायस. [Oh wow! You've started speaking great English.] Speaker C: माय सिव्ही ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on MySivi app. You too start today. Trial for just 1 Rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Neha, Devesh. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: Two users discuss overcoming their initial awkwardness and building confidence by practicing English daily on the MySivi app. The ad highlights that over 1 crore people use the app and promotes a limited-time trial offer for just ₹1.
